assertions.assertion: Overrides ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync in a DynamicClientRegistrationValidator subclass
assertions.rationale: Code shows `protected override async Task ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync(DynamicClientRegistrationContext context)` in `SoftwareStatementDcrValidator : DynamicClientRegistrationValidator`.

assertions.assertion: Calls context.SetError when the software statement is missing or invalid
assertions.rationale: Calls `context.SetError("A software statement is required...")` when missing and `context.SetError("Invalid software statement: ...")` when invalid.

assertions.assertion: Validates the JWT software statement using JsonWebTokenHandler or equivalent with ValidIssuer set to the trusted issuer URL
Maps claims from the software statement (e.g. software_name) to context.Client properties
Calls base.ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync at the end of successful validation
assertions.rationale: Code ends with `await base.ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync(context);` after successful validation.
